value.text: Oh {player}, Prof. Oak was looking for you!

properties.name: text
properties.value:
TRAINER TIPS
Weaken POK{e}MON before attempting catpure!
When healthy, they map escape!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hey! You have POK{e}MON!
Come on!
Let's battle 'em!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Ssh! You'll scare the bugs away.
Another time, okay?

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Huh?
I ran out of POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Yo!
You can't jam out if you're a
POK{e}MON TRAINER!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
That totally stinks! Im going to 
catch some stronger ones!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hey! You have POK{e}MON!
Come on!
Let's battle 'em!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Ssh! You'll scare the bugs away.
Another time, okay?

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value: Did you know that POK{e}MON evolve?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
BUG POK{e}MON evolve quickly.
They're a lot of fun!

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
I give!
You're good at this!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hey, wait up!
What's the hurry? Why the rush?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Sometimes, you can find stuff on the ground.
I'm looking for the stuff I dropped.
Can you help me?

properties.name: text
properties.value:
For poison, use ANTIDOTE!
Get it at POK{e}MON MARTS!

properties.name: text
properties.value:
LEAVING VIRIDIAN FOREST
PEWTER CITY AHEAD

properties.name: text
properties.value:
I was throwing POK{e} BALLS to 
catch POK{e}MON, and I ran out.
That's why you can never have too
many POK{e} BALLS.

value.text:
OAK: Hey!
Don't go away yet!

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

value.text:
{rival}: Wait, {player}!
Let's check out our POK{e}MON!
Come on, I'll take you on!

{rival}: Okay! I'll make my
POK{e}MON battle to toughen it up!
{player}! Gramps!
Smell you later!

GARY: What, it's only {player}?
Gramps isn't around.

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

{rival}: Heh, I do't need to be greedy like you. I'm mature!
Go ahead and choose, {player}!

OAK: Now, {player}!
Inside those three POK{e} BALLS are POK{e}MON.
Which one will you choose for yourself?
